meta.title: Skills
meta.subtitle: A practical overview of the technical and professional skills I have developed through education, projects, and real-world experience.
meta.description: Skills section highlighting technologies, tools, and concepts I have learned and applied while working on academic, personal, and professional software engineering projects.

categories.name: Backend Development
categories.description: Skills related to server-side development, API design, authentication, and business logic implementation.

skills.name: Node.js
skills.description: Used Node.js to build scalable backend services, REST APIs, and authentication systems with a focus on clean architecture and maintainability.

skills.name: Express.js
skills.description: Applied Express.js for routing, middleware-based authentication, error handling, and building modular backend APIs.

categories.name: Frontend Development
categories.description: Skills focused on building user interfaces, handling state, and creating responsive web applications.

skills.name: React
skills.description: Used React to build component-based user interfaces, manage state, and render dynamic content such as blogs and structured data.
usedIn: Frontend modules of full stack projects

skills.name: Tailwind CSS
skills.description: Used Tailwind CSS to rapidly build responsive and consistent user interfaces with utility-first styling.

categories.name: Databases
categories.description: Skills related to data modeling, querying, and managing structured and semi-structured data.

skills.name: Microsoft SQL Server
skills.description: Designed relational schemas, wrote complex queries, and managed transactional data for backend-driven applications.

skills.name: MongoDB
skills.description: Used MongoDB for document-based data storage and flexible schema design in JavaScript-centric applications.

categories.name: Cloud and DevOps
categories.description: Skills focused on deploying, managing, and maintaining applications in cloud environments.

skills.name: AWS EC2
skills.description: Used AWS EC2 instances to deploy backend and frontend applications with proper security groups and server configuration.

skills.name: Nginx
skills.description: Configured Nginx as a reverse proxy to serve frontend applications and route API requests securely.

categories.name: Professional Skills
categories.description: Non-technical skills developed through teamwork, problem solving, and real-world project ownership.

skills.name: Problem Solving
skills.description: Ability to analyze problems, break them down logically, and implement effective technical solutions.

skills.name: Self Learning
skills.description: Consistently learning new technologies and concepts independently through documentation and practice.
